column3: The walker's outline blurs; for one round allies cannot be cleanly targeted through her.
Mark a spot where the world wears through; any Void Walker card played from that tile costs 1 less AP this turn.
Open a shrieking seam between two points on the field; allies passing through it spend no movement and emerge unseen.
Fold every threshold in sight into a single breath; reposition to any tile you can see and strike the target there.
A silent pulse of un-place; enemies in a line are briefly severed from their own bodies and lose their next reaction.

column1: # L3 Ghost Operative (4) — moves through voids, crosses impossible gaps

column3: Treat any wall, door, or barrier under one tile thick as if it were open. Until end of turn, your movement ignores closed obstacles.
Hold the void in your lungs; you cannot be detected, scanned, or tracked until you attack or speak.
Slip through a gap no wider than a hair; move through an enemy's space without triggering reactions and gain advantage on your next strike.
Scout a sliver of elsewhere; peek through any solid surface within sight and reveal what waits on the other side.

column1: # L3 Threshold Puller (4) — drags enemies into the in-between

column3: Reach into a target's shadow and pull them halfway through; the enemy is briefly displaced into the in-between and loses their next move.
Sink a void-hook into an enemy; on their next turn, you yank them one tile toward you at no cost.
Mark a tile as a false door; the first enemy to cross it stumbles into the in-between and is stunned when they return.
Every enemy adjacent to you is dragged one tile toward the nearest wall, edge, or hazard as the floor thins beneath them.

column1: # L3 Anchor Keeper (4) — stabilizes void-exposed allies

column3: Bind a thread of RESONANCE to an ally; while it holds they cannot be displaced, banished, or phased against their will.
Plant yourself as a fixed point; any ally who took void-touched damage since last turn recovers a small amount at start of their next turn.
Reach after an ally who has been phased, banished, or pulled into the in-between and return them to the tile beside you.
Sew the air shut around an ally for one round; they are immune to teleport, pull, and forced movement effects.
Open a door that was never there; step from your tile to anywhere you have ever been this combat, and take one free action on arrival.
Until the end of next round, no enemy can remember seeing you; attacks against you are made as if you were a stranger they had only heard rumored.
Grab an enemy and drag them bodily into the in-between; they vanish from the field for one full round and return prone beside you.
For the rest of the round, every enemy that moves ends their movement one tile closer to you instead of where they intended.
Speak an ally's true name; until the end of combat they cannot be reduced below one HP by void, phase, or banishment effects.
Seal every seam in the area for one round; no one, friend or foe, may teleport, phase, or be pulled while the stitches hold.
